transactions.delete_confirm: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.
transactions.name: Name

tooltips.cost_basis: Total amount invested across all instruments, net of accrued interest for bonds.
tooltips.market_value: Total current value of all holdings at today's market prices.
tooltips.total_pnl: Total profit or loss: unrealized (current holdings) + realized (from past sales). Income shown separately.
tooltips.income: Total dividends and bond coupons received since inception.
tooltips.xirr: Your annualized return considering the timing and size of all your investments. If you invested more before a rally, this will be higher than TWR.
tooltips.avg_cost: Weighted average purchase price per share, adjusted as you buy more.
tooltips.weight: Percentage of total portfolio market value.
tooltips.pnl: Total profit or loss: unrealized + realized.
tooltips.return: Percentage gain or loss relative to cost basis.
tooltips.est_tax: Estimated capital gains tax on unrealized profits.
tooltips.market_gain: Change in portfolio value due to market price movements.
tooltips.twr: Time-Weighted Return. Measures performance independent of cash flow timing.
tooltips.mwrr: Money-Weighted Return for the period. Reflects actual investor experience.
tooltips.volatility: Annualized standard deviation of daily returns. Measures how much returns fluctuate.
tooltips.sharpe_ratio: Return per unit of risk. Above 1 is good, above 2 is excellent.
tooltips.sortino_ratio: Like Sharpe but only penalizes downside volatility. Higher is better.
tooltips.max_drawdown: Largest peak-to-trough decline. Shows the worst loss you would have experienced.
